top_signals.title: Motive unveils integrated AI Stack at Vision 26
top_signals.summary:
Vision 26 brought Motive’s AI Dashcam Plus with stereo vision, Atlas AI and an automations engine that handles fault codes and coaching automatically.

The post Motive unveils integrated AI Stack at Vision 26 appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Defense-driven demand powers surge in US listings by mining firms
top_signals.summary: This year’s transactions have brought producers of antimony, rare earths, tungsten and uranium to the NYSE and Nasdaq.
